sentences.english: Do you usually finish tasks early or wait until the last minute?
sentences.korean: 보통 일을 일찍 끝내나요 아니면 마지막까지 미루나요?

sentences.english: Which approach do you think is better?
I used to be a last-minute person but I've trained myself to finish tasks early and it has transformed my life.
sentences.korean: 예전에는 마지막에 하는 사람이었지만 일찍 끝내도록 훈련했고 삶이 바뀌었어요.

sentences.english: When you finish early you have time to review and improve your work which always leads to better quality.
sentences.korean: 일찍 끝내면 작업을 검토하고 개선할 시간이 있어 항상 더 나은 품질로 이어져요.

sentences.english: More importantly finishing early eliminates the terrible stress and anxiety that comes with approaching deadlines.
sentences.korean: 더 중요한 것은 일찍 끝내면 마감이 다가올 때의 끔찍한 스트레스와 불안이 사라져요.

sentences.english: Some people claim they work better under pressure but research shows that last-minute work is almost always lower quality than work done with adequate time.
sentences.korean: 압박 속에 더 잘 일한다고 주장하는 사람이 있지만 연구에 따르면 마지막 순간 작업은 충분한 시간으로 한 작업보다 거의 항상 품질이 낮아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
